offer: For property managers handling 10-50 units, inconsistent tracking of work orders causes missed compliance inspections. We provide a streamlined platform instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem: Inconsistent tracking of work orders and compliance inspections
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try work order tracking and maintenance scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
